prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-135CKWAEFSAH-135-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 13.5" American Eagle & Flag Collector Hunting Knife with Scabbard & Etched Blade Description: This 13.5" hunting knife will make an impressive addition to your collection. The handle and scabbard feature eagle designs, with an eagle head at the base of the grip and intricate etching on the 7" stainless steel blade.

You'll want to have this knife handy either for your outdoor gear or to act as a stylish decorative element in your home. Shopping for someone else? This knife is a perfect gift for the avid hunter and outdoorsman. Search Terms: collectable authentic steel blade outdoorsman knives dagger outdoor gear camping equipment knife personal defense throwing Features: - 7" Acid Etched Stainless Steel Blade - Etched Eagle Head Handle - Eagle and American Flag on Scabbard - Eagle Design on Handle - 13.5" Overall Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.5" American Eagle Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.5-in Hunting Knife with Scabbard

anthropic.title_differentiation: 7 Inch Acid Etched Stainless Steel Blade, Eagle Head Handle, American Flag Scabbard, Collector Quality

openai.title_differentiation: Acid Etched Stainless Steel Blade, Eagle Head Handle, Eagle And American Flag Scabbard, 135-Inch Overall Length
